h7dd53b22g1d80g407bga49egd20343c8074c: I - I can't blame you for that. Vampires are monsters, by any account.
h33cb98f7g2646g45fag8782gc2fb7ef5d527: But it doesn't sit right, just handing him over.
h5da08164gd046g4ebfg8262gfb89d7bb196d: I did you a favour. The frontiers you protect are safer without him.
hd25b7f27gadb9g4885g942fg1c679c4c78e9: You're right, of course. The sort are known for their... unsavoury tastes.
hec477c7cgffaag4739g989dg88d4b1c75205: I'd grown fond of the lad, though. I might yet have shown him the way of the hero.
he7a2d505g86beg4183g808cgc09ca5a86b93: I didn't surrender Astarion for being a monster. I did it because it was fun.
h3f1ba192gcc4cg4752g8cfbg03f5a3e8adb3: Relief, I can reckon with. Fun? Not so much.
h409536c7gcb4cg41c2gb8f3g15efd309b381: I'm not so convinced he was the only monster among us.
hecf27440gf3f4g499cgbc6eg24025fc310cb: He'd turn on us sooner or later. The hunter saved us some trouble.
hc3d7d69dg1541g4379gae3eg187a334a643f: Far be it from me to deny a hero his quarry.
h493d96ffg5409g444fgac7fg9b23e9112172: I'd grown fond of Astarion, though. I might yet have shown him the way of the hero.
